tests.test_body:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i8 @llvm.umax.i8(i8, i8) #0

define i8 @udiv_shl_no_overflow(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @udiv_shl_no_overflow(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = add i8 [[Y:%.*]], 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[MUL1:%.*]] = lshr i8 [[X:%.*]], [[TMP1]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[MUL1]]
  %shl = shl nuw i8 2, %y
  %min = call i8 @llvm.umax.i8(i8 %shl, i8 1)
  %mul = udiv i8 %x, %min
  ret i8 %mul
}

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

define i32 @sdiv_shl_pair2(i32 %a, i32 %x, i32 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @sdiv_shl_pair2(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SHL_DIVIDEND:%.*]] = shl nuw nsw i32 1, [[X:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DIV:%.*]] = lshr i32 [[SHL_DIVIDEND]], [[Y:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[DIV]]
entry:
  %lhs = shl nuw nsw i32 %a, %x
  %rhs = shl nsw i32 %a, %y
  %div = sdiv i32 %lhs, %rhs
  ret i32 %div
}
tests.source_program:
define i32 @sdiv_shl_pair2(i32 %a, i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %lhs = shl nuw nsw i32 %a, %x
  %rhs = shl nsw i32 %a, %y
  %div = sdiv i32 %lhs, %rhs
  ret i32 %div
}
tests.current_optimized_program:
define i32 @sdiv_shl_pair2(i32 %a, i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %lhs = shl nuw nsw i32 %a, %x
  %rhs = shl nsw i32 %a, %y
  %div = sdiv i32 %lhs, %rhs
  ret i32 %div
}

tests.test_body:
declare void @use32(i32)

define i32 @sdiv_shl_pair_multiuse2(i32 %a, i32 %x, i32 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @sdiv_shl_pair_multiuse2(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RHS:%.*]] = shl nsw i32 [[A:%.*]], [[Y:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use32(i32 [[RHS]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SHL_DIVIDEND:%.*]] = shl nuw nsw i32 1, [[X:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DIV:%.*]] = lshr i32 [[SHL_DIVIDEND]], [[Y]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[DIV]]
entry:
  %lhs = shl nuw nsw i32 %a, %x
  %rhs = shl nsw i32 %a, %y
  call void @use32(i32 %rhs)
  %div = sdiv i32 %lhs, %rhs
  ret i32 %div
}

entry:

  %div = sdiv i32 %lhs, %rhs

entry:

  call void @use32(i32 %rhs)
  %shl.dividend = shl nuw nsw i32 1, %x
  %div = lshr i32 %shl.dividend, %y
  ret i32 %div
}

declare void @use32(i32)

define i32 @sdiv_shl_pair_multiuse3(i32 %a, i32 %x, i32 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @sdiv_shl_pair_multiuse3(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[LHS:%.*]] = shl nuw nsw i32 [[A:%.*]], [[X:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RHS:%.*]] = shl nsw i32 [[A]], [[Y:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use32(i32 [[LHS]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use32(i32 [[RHS]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SHL_DIVIDEND:%.*]] = shl nuw nsw i32 1, [[X]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DIV:%.*]] = lshr i32 [[SHL_DIVIDEND]], [[Y]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[DIV]]
entry:
  %lhs = shl nuw nsw i32 %a, %x
  %rhs = shl nsw i32 %a, %y
  call void @use32(i32 %lhs)
  call void @use32(i32 %rhs)
  %div = sdiv i32 %lhs, %rhs
  ret i32 %div
}
tests.source_program:
declare void @use32(i32)

define i32 @sdiv_shl_pair_multiuse3(i32 %a, i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %lhs = shl nuw nsw i32 %a, %x
  %rhs = shl nsw i32 %a, %y
  call void @use32(i32 %lhs)
  call void @use32(i32 %rhs)
  %div = sdiv i32 %lhs, %rhs
  ret i32 %div
}

define i32 @sdiv_shl_pair_multiuse3(i32 %a, i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:

  %rhs = shl nsw i32 %a, %y
  call void @use32(i32 %lhs)
  call void @use32(i32 %rhs)
  %div = sdiv i32 %lhs, %rhs
  ret i32 %div
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
declare void @use32(i32)

define i32 @sdiv_shl_pair_multiuse3(i32 %a, i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %lhs = shl nuw nsw i32 %a, %x
  %rhs = shl nsw i32 %a, %y
  call void @use32(i32 %lhs)
  call void @use32(i32 %rhs)
  %shl.dividend = shl nuw nsw i32 1, %x
  %div = lshr i32 %shl.dividend, %y
  ret i32 %div
}

tests.test_body:
define i32 @sdiv_shl_pair_const(i32 %a) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @sdiv_shl_pair_const(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 2
entry:
  %lhs = shl nsw i32 %a, 2
  %rhs = shl nsw i32 %a, 1
  %div = sdiv i32 %lhs, %rhs
  ret i32 %div
}
tests.source_program:

entry:

  %rhs = shl nsw i32 %a, 1
  %div = sdiv i32 %lhs, %rhs
  ret i32 %div
}

issue.title: [InstCombine] (a+a+a+a)/(a+a) is not optimized
issue.body:
Test case: https://godbolt.org/z/7caGb3avf
```c
int n1;
void func1(int a){

    if(a>0&&a<10){
        n1=(a+a+a+a)/(a+a);
    }
}
```
It appears that `InstCombine` is missing this pattern `(a+a+a+a)/(a+a) => 2`
clang -O3:
```llvm
if.then:
  %a.tr = trunc i32 %a to i8
  %div.lhs.trunc = shl nuw nsw i8 %a.tr, 2
  %div.rhs.trunc = shl nuw nsw i8 %a.tr, 1
  %div12 = udiv i8 %div.lhs.trunc, %div.rhs.trunc
  %div.zext = zext i8 %div12 to i32
  store i32 %div.zext, ptr @n1, align 4
  br label %if.end
```
```asm
func1(int):                              # @func1(int)
        lea     eax, [rdi - 1]
        cmp     eax, 8
        ja      .LBB0_2
        lea     eax, [4*rdi]
        add     dil, dil
        movzx   eax, al
        div     dil
        movzx   eax, al
        mov     dword ptr [rip + n1], eax
.LBB0_2:                                # %if.end
        ret
```

proof: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/5UXwMN
issue.author: ZY546

comments.author: XChy
comments.body:
InstSimplify should simplify `(a << C1) / (a << C2) -> (1 << C1) / (1 << C2)`.
InstCombine should fold `(X << Y) / (X << Z) -> (1 << Y) / (1 << Z)`

comments.author: mgood7123
comments.body: would this be applicable to other expression combinations?
